Jain Dental Centre Dr. Vikas Jain's Jain Dental Centre is a multi-speciality dental care centre providing world-class dental treatment. Our team of dental specialists and quality staff provide you with the most modern treatment that can bring about a speedy recovery for any of your problem regarding your dental health. Awards & Recognitions NABH Accredited Clinic Appointment Treatments International Patients We are a team of English speaking dental specialists qualified to handle a broad range of oral healthcare issues. We offer treatments at a price far below what is charged in most of the developed countries. Jain Dental Centre is now accredited by the National Accreditation Board for Hospitals & Healthcare Providers (NABH), the highest recognition for quality patient care and safety in India thereby joining the league of very few NABH accredited Dental Clinics in India. Our dental centres are ISO 9001: 2008 certified and we follow highest standards for hygiene, safety and ethics set by Indian Dental Association. Plan Your Visit Get Expert Opinion Facilities FAQ Cost Comparision Dental Implant Despite improvements in dental care, millions of people suffer tooth loss -- mostly due to tooth decay, gingivitis (gum disease), or injuries. For many years, the only treatment option available for people with missing teeth were bridges and dentures. But today, dental implants are the best option available. A dental implant is a small titanium fixture that serves as a replacement for the root portion of a missing natural tooth. Titanium is used because it is most compatible with our human body. Dental implant patients range from age nine to 99.
